title: Credit Cards Australia - CommBank
summary: Discover more about our range of low rate, low-fee, no-fee, interest-free and rewards points credit cards . Apply now for a response in 60 seconds.

nodes.name: Understanding credit cards (FAQs)
nodes.summary: Understanding credit cards (FAQs)

nodes.name: What is a credit card?
nodes.summary: A credit card allows you to borrow money from a bank, giving you access to a predetermined amount of funds, known as your credit limit. This limit is established when you apply for the card, and it re
nodes.content_preview: A credit card allows you to borrow money from a bank, giving you access to a predetermined amount of funds, known as your credit limit. This limit is established when you apply for the card, and it re

nodes.name: How do credit cards work?
nodes.summary: When using a credit card, you are effectively borrowing money from a lender. You’ll have to pay back that money in the future, possibly along with interest, too. More information about credit cards an
nodes.content_preview: When using a credit card, you are effectively borrowing money from a lender. You’ll have to pay back that money in the future, possibly along with interest, too. More information about credit cards an

nodes.name: How does credit card interest work?
nodes.summary: Credit card interest is a charge for borrowing money from a financial institution with your credit card. How much interest you’ll pay depends on the type of card you have, the transactions you make, a
nodes.content_preview: Credit card interest is a charge for borrowing money from a financial institution with your credit card. How much interest you’ll pay depends on the type of card you have, the transactions you make, a

nodes.name: What you need when applying for a Credit Card
nodes.summary: Before you begin your credit card application, it's important you meet our eligibility criteria and have a few documents ready for the application. For a handy guide to help you get started on your cr
